text.title: Paid Test-Task Scoring Rubric Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Paid Test-Task Scoring Rubric. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: define-dimensions
step.action: Pick 3-5 scoring dimensions tied to the role scorecard.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: write-anchors
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: calibrate
step.action: Score the samples jointly; revise anchors until disagreement <1 level.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: blind-score
step.action: Each reviewer scores independently with candidate identity hidden.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: pay-and-debrief
step.action: Pay every candidate within 5 business days regardless of outcome; debrief the score deltas.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
